title: stenogyne triangularis
intro: Stenogyne triangularis, also known as the Ma'o hau hele or yellow hibiscus, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Hawaii. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Stenogyne triangularis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Stenogyne triangularis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
